description: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a light wood finish. It features two pairs of doors at the bottom and a combination of a solid door and an open shelving unit at the top. The top section has two shelves within the open area, and the solid door on the left also has a wood panel insert. The handles and hinges are a metallic brass color. The cabinet has a slightly rustic or country feel due to the visible wood grain and simple construction. It appears to be a functional piece for storage or display.
